name: agent-lint
description: Static analysis & quality scoring for AI coding agent context artifacts (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, skills, rules, workflows, plans). Fully deterministic — no LLM, no database, no auth.

tools.name: analyze_artifact
tools.description: Analyze a single AI agent context artifact and return quality scores across 12 metrics

tools.name: analyze_workspace_artifacts
tools.description: Scan a workspace directory for AI agent artifacts with framework detection

tools.name: analyze_context_bundle
tools.description: Analyze multiple artifacts together for cross-artifact consistency

tools.name: prepare_artifact_fix_context
tools.description: Prepare context for an artifact improvement loop

tools.name: submit_client_assessment
tools.description: Submit a client LLM assessment with evidence-backed scores

tools.name: quality_gate_artifact
tools.description: Check if an artifact meets a target quality score

tools.name: suggest_patch
tools.description: Generate patch suggestions to improve an artifact

tools.name: validate_export
tools.description: Validate final artifact output for safety and correctness

resources.name: scoring-policy
resources.description: Client-led scoring policy with 12 metrics and type-based weights

resources.name: artifact-specs
resources.description: Artifact type specifications with required sections and anti-patterns
